dialogue.line: Wow... you have got to be kidding me!
What?! You're the one that started this by pointing a damn gun at my forehead!
Yeah, well, sorry glowsdick.
But the big man wants ya.
Woah woah, how did you know it glows?!
I... what?
HEY!! WAIT, IM NOT HERE FOR SMALL TALK!
ESPECIALLY WITH YOU LOSERS!
Jerk...
OH and that horrible rappin' you spat at the raveyard!
Your bitch ass finally decided to step up your game now?!
Pure load of bull if you ask me!
Actually that had to be one of my BEST performances!
Don't hate the player, hate the game, P.
DON'T, call me P!
I'm ONE trigger away from murkin' you, AND your girl.
GULP
My heebies have been jeebied and my timbers have been shivered!
Are you messing with me?
Yes.
*groans*
